channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Elsted street parking sign is sprayed, 14th March
item.description:
A permit holders tp is sprayed on elsted street opposite to lp 11 zone m1
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsted Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: James Watt Way Erith, 14th March
item.description:
Litter,Leaves & Detritus not being cleared. - No pavement/walkway cleaning is being carried out. Those fallen Autumn leaves mixed together with rubbish from the high number of 'Take Aways' abound. Now Spring has arrived that rubbish still remains un-swept ? Many previous requests concerning this matter have not been acted upon & the area is a mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): James Watt Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic/business rubbish dumped by bin, 14th March
item.description:
This keeps happening repeatedly. Same pink bags used, suggest the council speak to local business owners.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenluce Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Refund our council tax, 14th March
item.description:
More filth !! Right outside the drive entrance to Beckenham recreation park. Disgusting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish on pavement, 14th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Garden Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on 2nd half brocket way street, 14th March
item.description:
Pithole have been here for years, only potholes on half the street was fixed while the other side has now become hazardous for tyres and road safety in general, so many potholes that it could potentially pop someone’s tyre
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of council serviced, 14th March
item.description:
Another prime example of how the council are failing us. Why are we paying so much council tax when the services are getting worse. This pavement has not been touched in months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveland Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manciple street tp is sprayed, 14th March
item.description:
A permit holders tp is sprayed on manciple street opposite to lp 02
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manciple Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins unclaimed and fly tipping, 14th March
item.description:
Please can these bins be removed. Unclaimed. Blocking footpath. Encouraging fly tipping. Shopping trolley and garden waste also dumped on footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Goldsmith Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willow walk tp is sprayed, 14th March
item.description:
A shared use tp is sprayed on willow walk opposite to lp 15
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Willow Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped suitcase on drive, 14th March
item.description:
Fly tipped suitcase on private drive
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranmore Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover collapsing on the railway bridge, 14th March
item.description:
The drain cover and surrounding area is collapsing on the bridge. Quickly getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked at entrance of park, 14th March
item.description:
This persistent illegal parker and litter bugger has been parked in front the mouth of the park/ turning circle since 16:30 yesterday! I called the Police but if course, they didn't attend. Can Haringey Council paint some 'No Parking/ Littering/ Engine Idling' notices in this area?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norfolk Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dipping tiles, 14th March
item.description:
Dipping tiles still here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish Dumped, 14th March
item.description:
Bags of Rubbish Dumped on Road see photo. Area is regularly used to dump rubbish please consider installing cameras.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: East street parking signs have been vandelised, 14th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Walworth, Greater London
